metadata.description: MCP servers for integrating Jira, Confluence, and document conversion into AI-powered IDEs

plugins.name: jira-mcp
plugins.description: Read-only access to Jira Server/Data Center issues, comments, and JQL search

plugins.name: confluence-mcp
plugins.description: Read-only access to Confluence Server/Data Center pages, spaces, and CQL search

plugins.name: doc2md-mcp
plugins.description: Convert PDF, Swagger/OpenAPI specs, and web pages to Markdown with OCR support
